message.content:
The terminal is responsive but the old autotune process is still running. I can see 'echo 'TEST'' appeared in the output. Let me try Ctrl+C without newline first, then kill processes.

{"analysis":"Terminal is responsive - echo TEST appeared in output. The old autotune process is still running and outputting. Need to interrupt it properly with Ctrl+C, then kill Python processes.","plan":"Send Ctrl+C to interrupt the running process, wait, then kill all Python processes and verify clean state.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"C-c","duration":2.0},{"keystrokes":"C-c","duration":2.0},{"keystrokes":"killall -9 python3 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; echo 'CLEAN'\n","duration":5.0},{"keystrokes":"ps aux | grep -v grep | grep python\n","duration":1.0}]}
